DESCRIPTION: Against humans: gains Vicious. If already Vicious, +2 damage per Effect instead of +1.
If Torso Physical DR < 6: +1 CD damage per point below 6.
When using Defend and missed by melee: attacker suffers 4 CD Persistent Energy damage.
Bonus CD damage based on HP: <Max: +1, <75%: +2, <50%: +3, <25%: +4.
When using Defend or Sprint: +2 Physical DR until next turn.
When using Defend and missed by melee: attacker suffers 4 CD Stun Energy damage.
Attacking arm/leg: causes injury if 4+ damage inflicted in one hit.
When Aiming: additional minor/major actions cost 1 AP less (does not stack with Jet).
Once per scene: spend max Fire Rate ammo to declare Empty. Inflicts +2 CD damage; must reload.
When using Defend and missed by melee: roll 1 CD. On Effect, attacker is disarmed.
When inflicting damage: spend 1 Luck to Enrage enemy (must attack nearest enemy).
Each Effect rolled on damage hits secondary targets within Close range for half damage.
Against insects/mirelurks: gains Vicious. If already Vicious, +2 damage per Effect instead of +1.
When attacking: may spend 1 Luck to add Freeze damage effect.
When using Defend and missed by melee: attacker suffers 4 CD Freeze Energy damage.
Each consecutive hit on the same enemy in a scene adds +1 CD damage (cumulative).
Against ghouls: gains Vicious. If already Vicious, +2 damage per Effect instead of +1.
When Aiming: weapon inflicts +1 CD damage (stacks with Accurate).
Against mammals/lizards: gains Vicious. If already Vicious, +2 damage per Effect instead of +1.
Weapon gains Persistent (Energy) damage effect.
If target is at maximum HP: weapon inflicts +3 CD damage.
Weapon gains Radioactive damage effect.
Inflicts +1 CD damage for each addiction the wielder is suffering from.
Attacking leg: causes critical hit if 3+ damage inflicted in one hit.
After attack: if Luck was spent to reroll, roll 1 CD. On Effect, regain 1 spent Luck.
Against super mutants: gains Vicious. If already Vicious, +2 damage per Effect instead of +1.
When Aiming: may take a Move minor action for free.
Between sunset and sunrise: gains Vicious. If already Vicious, +2 per Effect instead of +1.
Gains Piercing 2. If already Piercing, increase rating by +2.
+2 CD damage. Deals both Energy and Physical damage (uses target's lower resistance).
Weapon gains Persistent (Poison) damage effect.
Attacks with this weapon inflict +2 CD damage.
Drawing item does not count against minor action limit and costs 0 AP.
Weapon gains +3 Fire Rate (can exceed 6).
On Critical Hit: may spend 1 Luck to regain all AP spent on the attack.
If you did not move last turn: +2 Physical/Energy DR. If Parry quality, +3 DR.
Weapon gains the Stun damage effect.
On Sneak Attack (with Aim and no other actions): replace 1d20 with a pre-rolled 1.
When Aiming: +2 Physical DR until next turn.
Against robots: gains Vicious. If already Vicious, +2 damage per Effect instead of +1.
Gains Vicious, +2 CD damage, and Ammo-Hungry (2) quality.
+2 CD damage; injury on 4+ damage. Gains Recoil (7) or increases existing Recoil by +1.
Weapon gains Persistent (Physical) damage effect.
Halve falling damage. If wearing two pieces: no damage from falling.
+2 Physical and Energy DR against human enemies.
Once per scene: if HP < 1/4 use a Stimpak automatically (no action required).
If HP < 1/2: +2 Physical and Energy DR to all locations. If HP < 1/4: +3 DR instead.
When using Defend or Sprint: +2 Physical DR to all locations until next turn.
When hidden and still: enemies add +1 difficulty to tests to find you.
Once per scene: may set 1d20 to a 1 on any STR or END test.
Once per scene: when hit by melee become invisible (as Stealth Boy).
Melee attackers increase complication range by 1. On complication: attacker suffers X CD Freeze Energy damage (X = their damage dice).
Once per scene: may set 1d20 to a 1 on any AGI or PER test.
Melee attackers increase complication range by 1. On complication: attacker is disarmed.
+2 Physical and Energy DR against insects; arachnids; and mirelurks.
+2 Physical; Energy; and Radiation DR against ghouls.
+2 Physical and Energy DR against mammals and lizards.
Melee attackers increase complication range by 1. On complication: attacker suffers X CD Persistent Energy damage (X = their damage dice).
Once per day: when spending Luck to reroll; may set a d20 to 1 or all CD to Effects instead.
If HP < 1/4: reduce AP cost of additional actions by 1 (does not stack with Jet).
+2 Physical and Energy DR against super mutants.
Provides +4 Poison damage resistance.
Add 1 AP to the group pool at the start of each of your turns in combat.
When hit by melee: each Effect rolled on damage inflicts 1 damage (same type) back to the attacker.
Once per scene: if irradiated; set 1d20 to a 1 on a STR test. +1 use per 5 Rad damage.
Once per scene: may set 1d20 to a 1 on any Lockpick test.
If you did not move last turn: +3 Physical and Energy DR.
Once per scene: may set 1d20 to a 1 on any INT or CHA test.
Reduce AP cost to cross difficult terrain or obstacles by 1 (min 0).
+2 Physical and Energy DR against robots.
If HP < 1/4: may re-roll 1d20 on any test attempted.
